create.title: New postcard
create.subtitle: Pick a photo, design your card and send it off. ✉️
create.cropHint: 🔍 To crop, just zoom right in the preview — with two fingers, the mouse wheel or a double tap. Then drag to reposition the shot.
create.customStampTitle: Your own stamp (double tap to change)
create.noFriends: You haven't connected with any friends yet. Invite someone via "💌 Invite" above — once they join, they'll show up here.
create.guestBanner: In guest mode your card only stays on this device. To really send cards to friends, create a free account.
create.previewHint: Here's how your card will look
create.errGeoUnsupported: Location isn't supported by this browser.
create.errNeedRecipient: Please choose at least one recipient.
create.errNoRecipient: This person hasn't joined yet. Invite them via "💌 Invite" above.

card.panHint: Drag to move · double tap to reset
card.zoomHint: Double tap or use 2 fingers to zoom

mailbox.title: Mailbox
mailbox.subtitle: The postcards you've received and sent.
mailbox.sentToast: ✅ Postcard sent! It's in your outbox now.
mailbox.guestBanner: To receive real postcards from friends, you'll need a free account.
mailbox.emptyOutbox: You haven't sent anything yet. Create your first card!

world.title: World view
world.subtitle: Every postcard sits right where its photo was taken. 🌍
world.empty: No located postcards yet — add a location when you create one.

pinboard.title: Pinboard
pinboard.subtitle: Pin up your favorite cards and arrange them just so.
pinboard.emptyBodyAfter: and tap "Pin" — it'll show up here, ready to hang and move around.
pinboard.tip: Tip: cards can be moved freely — just drag them across the board. Tap a card or the ⟳ icon to see the back.

friends.title: My friends
friends.guestBanner: Connect with real friends by creating a free account and sharing your invite link.
friends.empty: No friends yet. Share your invite link to get started!
friends.introduceBody: Choose who {{name}} should meet. Both will be connected and can send each other postcards.
friends.needMore: You need more friends before you can introduce someone.

auth.feature1Desc: Design personal cards with text and pick the perfect sender location.
auth.feature2Desc: Receive cards from friends all over the world right in your inbox.
auth.feature3Desc: See on an interactive map where your postcards have traveled from.
auth.feature4Desc: Pin up your prettiest cards and proudly show them to your world.
auth.inviteRegister: You've been invited! Create an account to receive postcards.
auth.inviteLogin: You've been invited! Log in — you'll be connected automatically.
auth.name: Name
auth.tryGuest: Just try it without an account first →

welcome.title: Welcome to Wanderpost!
welcome.intro: Send your friends virtual greetings from all over the world. Here's how it works:
welcome.step1Text: Choose or take a photo, decorate it, add text & a stamp, and send it off.
welcome.step2Text: This is where cards from friends land — and your sent ones go in the outbox.
welcome.step3Text: Every card sits on the map exactly where its photo was taken.
welcome.step4Text: Pin your favorite cards to the corkboard and arrange them just so.

invite.shareText: I'm sending you postcards on Wanderpost! Join with this link:
invite.heading: Invite friends 💌
invite.body: Share this link so friends can join and receive your postcards.

decorator.heading: Decorate photo 🎨
decorator.stickerHint: Tap to place · drag to move · double tap to remove

notif.blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser
notif.on: Notifications on — tap to turn off

pwa.installPromptBody: Open it right from your home screen — faster, full-screen, with notifications.
pwa.installGuideBody: On your screen in just a few steps — we'll show you exactly how.

guide.heading: Install Wanderpost
guide.subtitle: So your postcards are always just one tap away.
guide.benefit1: Open right from your home screen — no more searching
guide.benefit2: Full-screen, with no address bar at all
guide.benefit3: A reminder as soon as new mail arrives for you

ios.intro: This works in the Safari browser. If you have another app open, just open this page in Safari for a moment.
ios.step1: Tap the share icon in the bottom bar — the square with the arrow pointing up.
ios.step2: Swipe down a little in the menu and tap "Add to Home Screen".
ios.step3: Tap "Add" in the top right. Done — the Wanderpost icon is now on your home screen.

ios-chrome.intro: In Chrome on the iPhone, the share icon is at the top, not the bottom.
ios-chrome.step1: Tap the share icon in the top right (a square with an arrow pointing up). Don't see it? Open the three-dots menu ⋯ first.
ios-chrome.step2: Choose "Add to Home Screen" in the menu.
ios-chrome.step3: Tap "Add". Done — the Wanderpost icon is now on your home screen.
ios-chrome.note: Tip: it works the same way in Safari — there you'll find the share icon in the bottom bar.

android.step1: Tap the menu in the top right — the three stacked dots.
android.step2: Choose "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
android.step3: Confirm with "Install". Done — Wanderpost shows up with your apps.

desktop-chromium.step1: Look at the address bar right at the top. On the right you'll see a little icon — a screen with an arrow pointing down.
desktop-chromium.step3: Wanderpost opens in its own window and lands in your Start menu or the Dock.
desktop-chromium.note: No icon to be seen? Click the menu in the top right (three dots) and then "Install app".

desktop-safari.step1: In the top right of Safari, click the share icon — the square with the arrow pointing up.
desktop-safari.step3: Confirm with "Add". Wanderpost is now in your Dock.
desktop-safari.note: Can't find "Add to Dock"? Then your macOS is a bit older — the easiest way is to install Wanderpost with Chrome or Microsoft Edge.

desktop-firefox.intro: Unfortunately, Firefox can't save web apps as their own app on the computer.
desktop-firefox.step1: Easiest option: open this page once in Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge — there you can install Wanderpost with one click.
desktop-firefox.step2: Want to stick with Firefox? Bookmark the page with Ctrl + D, then it's always close at hand.

other.step1: Open your browser's menu (often three dots or three lines in the top right).
other.step2: Look for "Install app" or "Add to Home screen" and tap it.
other.step3: Confirm — after that you open Wanderpost straight from the app icon.
